The two Kin Followers cycle through a fixed 3-move pattern (starting offset from each other — one begins with Quick Slash, the other with Power Dance), dealing high melee damage and buffing their own Strength over time. The Kin can also heal the Priest's main body and launch multi-hit holy blast attacks. The boss follows a repeating 4-turn sequence. Damage output from all three enemies scales over time, so the fight punishes slow decks. Killing the Kin Priest ends the fight immediately — the Followers flee as minions.",

Use the Silent's strong card draw (Ring of the Snake turn 1, Acrobatics, Prepared) to cycle into your key cards quickly and front-load your damage. If your deck has 40+ burst damage available, you can alternatively rush the Kin Priest directly to end the fight before Follower Strength ramps become dangerous.
